summary.concern: Stephanie and Marc Felton — 11 overdue tasks

paragraphs: Overdue climbed to 41 — we need to reverse this today. 1 task should be active but is stuck waiting on blockers — these need immediate attention.

151 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **78 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 17 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$64,799 in payments going out this week** across 35 tasks — make sure funds are available. $10,506 expected in from 1 client payment. Heavy week ahead for Katie Holmes & Sean Springs and Kyle Aubry - Project 01 — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco's overdue has been growing over the past few days — now at 10. This needs to turn around today.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 2 overdue — oldest first. **8 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 33 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
